mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Strong labor market conditions, indicated by rising payrolls (PAYEMS) and declining unemployment (UNRATE), signal inflationary pressures that prompt monetary tightening, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal, or pairwise correlation between PAYEMS/UNRATE and SPX returns falls below -0.2.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production (INDPRO) reflects robust manufacturing activity that boosts corporate earnings, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: INDPRO growth exceeds 1.5% YoY but 5-day SPX returns remain negative in > 50% of cases, or rolling 3-month IC < 0.1.

mechanism_narrative: Strong housing starts (HOUST) indicate elevated consumer confidence and construction activity, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: HOUST exceeds 1,100k units but 60-day SPX returns are negative in > 40% of cases, or rolling 5-year IC < 0.05.

mechanism_narrative: Persistent above-target inflation (CPIAUCSL > 3.0%) triggers aggressive monetary tightening, resulting in negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: CPIAUCSL exceeds 3.0% but 20-day SPX returns are positive in > 50% of cases, or rolling 3-year IC > -0.1.

mechanism_narrative: Strong real sales (RSAFS) reflect resilient consumer spending that supports corporate revenues, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: RSAFS growth exceeds 2.0% YoY but 20-day SPX returns are negative in > 30% of cases, or rolling 2-year IC < 0.07.

mechanism_narrative: A declining unemployment rate (UNRATE) signals tighter labor markets that increase wage pressures and corporate costs, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: UNRATE declines 0.5pp but 5-day SPX returns are positive in > 50% of cases, or pairwise correlation between UNRATE and SPX returns exceeds -0.15.

mechanism_narrative: A divergence between rising inflation (CPIAUCSL) and stagnant monetary policy (FEDFUNDS) creates uncertainty that drives negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: CPIAUCSL exceeds FEDFUNDS by 1.0% but 20-day SPX returns are positive in > 40% of cases, or interaction term coefficient is not statistically significant (p > 0.1).
